ASHCO Costing / Working Out

Based on the ASHCO costing template. Add rows for labour/material items, lodge, sundry and missed materials; the quote breakdown imports Labour, Materials, Lodge and Total Price separately.

Risk Assessment & Method Statement

Create a food-factory ready safe system of work from the accepted quote. Tick the risks that apply, then edit the generated wording before printing.

Invoice

Create an invoice from the current quote/job, or use Standalone Invoice when no job has been raised. Saved invoices feed the monthly totals below.

Job Schedule

Labour Charge Rates

These rates are used for job labour costings from timesheet A/B/C hours. Change A manually, or apply a percentage to keep B and C at the same relative uplift.

RefCustomerSiteProjectStatusEstimated LabourTimesheet HoursActual LabourVarianceEmployeesAction

Labour Planner

Select a week, then type where each person is working. Approved holidays from the Timesheet app appear automatically and stay locked.

Manual Planner Holiday

Use this if an approved holiday from the Timesheet app has not appeared yet, or for Wayne/David planner holidays. It locks the holiday into the labour planner.

GitHub and your computer use separate browser storage, so use Sync Approved Holidays to pull approved holidays from the timesheet database.
